name: freax-agent-skills
description: Public Claude Code plugin marketplace by freaxnx01 — sharable, non-personal skills.

plugins.name: sync-ai-instructions
plugins.description: Initialize or update a project's AI agent instruction files (CLAUDE.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md, SKILL.md, .ai/*) by pulling base + one stack overlay from github.com/freaxnx01/ai-instructions. Idempotent — works for first-time setup and re-runs to keep files in sync.

plugins.name: propose-ai-instructions
plugins.description: Reverse of sync-ai-instructions. Scans the current project for stack-specific conventions (v1: Makefile targets for the dotnet stack), classifies each as generic-enough-to-promote vs. project-specific, and writes a reviewable proposal patch for github.com/freaxnx01/ai-instructions. Never commits or pushes upstream — output is a proposal file the user reviews and lands manually.

plugins.name: delegate-to-github-ai
plugins.description: Hand a coding task off to a GitHub AI assignee (Copilot or Claude) by creating a self-contained issue brief and assigning it to the right bot. Includes pre-flight check, delegate-vs-keep-local decision aid, the issue-body template AI agents behave best on, the exact gh issue create invocation, and follow-up etiquette for the resulting draft PR.
